response.overview: The film revolves around Ashraf, played by Zizan Razak, who is about to get married but has gambled away all his savings in a get-rich-quick investment scheme without realizing it is a scam. After discovering he has been deceived, Ashraf begins searching for the head of the scam syndicate, Farouk, played by Tony Eusoff. At the same time, he also befriends several other scam victims such as Daniel played by MK, Sarah played by Ezlynn, and Uncle Kassim played by Azhar Sulaiman.
response.title: Rompak di Astro First
